Flow.description: Screen Flow to be used on a Task created by an Action Plan for Partner Opportunities to surface Opportunity Fields on the Task to be updated.
Flow.interviewLabel: Action Plan Task: Update Partner Opportunity Fields {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Action Plan Task: Update Partner Opportunity Fields

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
There was an error on the ??? Flow during the {!varStage} Action.


Please contact your Salesforce Administrator for Assistance.

fields.name: GroupInsuranceOpportunityFieldsMessage
fields.fieldText:
These are the relevant fields from the Related Opportunity for this Action Plan Task.


Please update as required.

screens.name: IR35_Health_Check_Opportunity_Fields_Screen
screens.label: IR35 Health Check Opportunity Fields Screen

fields.name: IR35HealthCheckOpportunityFieldsMessage
fields.fieldText:
These are the relevant fields from the Related Opportunity for this Action Plan Task.


Please update as required.
